value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Lane C wave5 (opus orchestration, 2026-06-15): sub-agent lane-c-agent-20260614-opus ran ~40min (146 tool calls), cut off by session-limit pre-documentation. Landed: new tests/unit/lane-c/scripts-wave5.spec.ts (run-gates, release/utils, smoke-claude-plugin, smoke-codex-plugin-mcp, plugin-mcp-smoke-harness, run-tests, smoke-cleanup branches) + modified scripts (check-secrets, check-secrets-lib, contracts-snapshot, finalize-build, gen-package-runtime-loaders, gen-plugin-mcp-wrappers, generate-release-notes, prepare-build-cache, release/run-gates, release/utils) to expose testable functions. Orchestrator fixed 7 cut-off-left broken smoke-claude-plugin tests: query-bust on importRepoModule defeated vi.doMock of the transitive ./plugin-mcp-smoke-harness.mjs import; added importRepoModuleStable (no query) so the mock matches.

patch.value: Coverage to 100%: build, release, and smoke scripts

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Bug fix (claude-code-agent, 2026-06-15): the migrated tests/unit/scripts/dogfood-package-first.spec.ts had 2 failing tests in the new PM_DOGFOOD_SEMANTIC=1 path. Root cause: the test's semantic spawn-mock matched ALL 'search-advanced' invocations (pmArgs[0]==='search-advanced'), hijacking the main-flow keyword search-advanced probe (which runs before the semantic probe and expects mode=keyword). The script's keyword assertion then threw, so the JSON summary with semantic_dogfood.attempted was never the last log line. Fix: narrowed both override matchers to require --hybrid (the semantic probe's search-advanced call carries --hybrid; the keyword call does not). Verified: 10/10 pass.

value.author: codex-coverage-lead-20260615
value.text:

Assigned residual files (2) for this item: scripts/generate-release-notes.mjs and scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs.
Both files are statement/function/line complete but still below 100 in branch coverage; this item owns final branch closure.
